headline: Viatris (VTRS): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: Viatris has been on fire lately. In the past six months alone, the company’s stock price has rocketed 58.2%, reaching $16.13 per share. This was partly thanks to its solid quarterly results, and the run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.
